title: EU Settlement Scheme: information for status holders and applicants
body: "Learn what eligible EU, EEA, Swiss citizens and their family members who have applied to the EU Settlement Scheme by 30 June 2021 need to know following the 30 June 2021 application deadline. It includes how to prove their status (pre-settled or settled) and what to do if they are waiting for a decision.     Read more information and view promotional material on supporting EU citizens to apply to stay in the UK. "

taxons.title: Rights of EU and EEA citizens
